title: Nabha Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Nābha, with a Z-Score of +3.49. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Nābha is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 44%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 6.2 km/h, which can contribute to the heat feeling more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
